title: phacelia circinata var. pinnata
intro: Phacelia circinata var. pinnata is a perennial plant native to the southwestern United States, characterized by its unique, pinnately divided leaves. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits associated with Phacelia circinata var. pinnata include its potential to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of this plant, typically in the form of teas or infusions, are used to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to fully understand its effects on human health.
